add-png-logo-to-first-pdf-page.title: Add PNG Logo to First PDF Page
add-png-logo-to-first-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, place a PNG logo at specific coordinates on the first page, and save the modified document.

add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image to PDF Pages with Opacity
add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a background image on every page of a PDF and set its opacity to 30% using Aspose.Pdf.

add-transparent-png-overlay-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Transparent PNG Overlay to PDF Pages
add-transparent-png-overlay-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating through its pages, and applying a transparent PNG overlay using an ImageStamp positioned above existing content.

add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image watermark on every page of a PDF and rotate it 45° for diagonal placement using Aspose.Pdf.

add-company-logo-to-first-page.title: Add Company Logo to First Page of PDF
add-company-logo-to-first-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a centered ImageStamp for a logo, add it only to the first page, and save the modified document.

add-decorative-header-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Decorative Header Image to PDF Pages
add-decorative-header-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a header image at the top of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, calculating page dimensions and adding the image as a stamp.

add-scalable-footer-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Scalable Footer Image to PDF Pages
add-scalable-footer-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert a decorative footer image on every page of a PDF and scale it proportionally to the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent pattern image as a background on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent background pattern image on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-to-pdf.title: Add Background Image to PDF Pages
add-background-image-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, adding a background image to each page using a BackgroundArtifact, setting it as a background with reduced opacity to simulate a multiply blend, and saving the result.

add-background-texture-overlay-to-pdf-pa.title: Add Background Texture Overlay to PDF Pages
add-background-texture-overlay-to-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent background image to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's BackgroundArtifact for a subtle overlay effect.

add-semi-transparent-overlay-image-to-pd.title: Add Semi-Transparent Overlay Image to PDF
add-semi-transparent-overlay-image-to-pd.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent image overlay to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then flatten the transparency and save the result.

add-semi-transparent-overlay-to-pdf-page.title: Add Semi-Transparent Color Overlay to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-overlay-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a theme configuration from a JSON file and apply a semi‑transparent color overlay to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-image-watermark-to-.title: Add Semi-Transparent Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-image-watermark-to-.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent PNG image as a watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with the opacity set from a configuration value.

replace-image-on-pdf-page-with-png.title: Replace Image on PDF Page with High-Resolution PNG
replace-image-on-pdf-page-with-png.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, accessing the XImageCollection of page three via Resources.Images, and replacing an existing JPEG with a higher‑resolution PNG before saving the document.

replace-jpeg-with-png-in-pdf.title: Replace JPEG Images with PNG in PDF
replace-jpeg-with-png-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through each page's image resources, and replacing every JPEG image with a specified PNG while keeping the original layout.

replace-raster-with-vector.title: Replace Raster Images with Vector Graphics in PDF
replace-raster-with-vector.description: Demonstrates how to extract vector graphics from PDF pages, remove raster images, and save a vector‑only PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-images-odd-pages-placeholder.title: Replace Images on Odd PDF Pages with a Placeholder
replace-images-odd-pages-placeholder.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, detect image placements on odd‑numbered pages, and replace each image with a placeholder graphic while preserving its original size.

replace-odd-page-images-with-qr-placehol.title: Replace Images on Odd PDF Pages with QR Code Placeholder
replace-odd-page-images-with-qr-placehol.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF, replace every image on odd‑numbered pages with a QR‑code placeholder image, and assign alternative text that links to the original image source.

replace-images-even-pages-grayscale.title: Replace Images on Even PDF Pages with Grayscale
replace-images-even-pages-grayscale.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages and converts only the even‑numbered pages to grayscale, effectively replacing the images on those pages with grayscale versions.

replace-images-last-page-with-banner.title: Replace Images on Last Page with Banner
replace-images-last-page-with-banner.description: Shows how to hide all existing images on the last page of a PDF and insert a single banner image that spans the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

compress-large-images-in-pdf.title: Compress Large Images in PDF
compress-large-images-in-pdf.description: Shows how to reduce PDF size by compressing images (e.g., those over 1 MB) using Aspose.Pdf's optimization options.

replace-pdf-images-with-placeholders.title: Replace PDF Images with Placeholders and Add Hyperlink References
replace-pdf-images-with-placeholders.description: Demonstrates how to replace each image in a PDF with a low‑resolution placeholder and attach a link annotation that points to the original image location.

convert-pdf-images-to-monochrome.title: Convert PDF Images to Monochrome
convert-pdf-images-to-monochrome.description: Shows how to replace each image in a PDF with its grayscale version using Aspose.Pdf, resulting in a uniform monochrome document.

correct-exif-orientation-in-pdf.title: Correct EXIF Orientation of Images in PDF
correct-exif-orientation-in-pdf.description: The example loads a PDF, detects EXIF orientation metadata in each embedded image, rotates/flips the image accordingly, and replaces it in the PDF to ensure proper display.

compress-large-images-in-pdf__v2.title: Compress Large Images in PDF with JPEG Optimization
compress-large-images-in-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, configuring image compression options to replace images larger than 2 MB with compressed JPEGs, and saving the optimized document.

replace-pdf-images-with-qr-placeholder.title: Replace PDF Images with QR Code Placeholder
replace-pdf-images-with-qr-placeholder.description: Shows how to open a PDF, iterate through each page's image resources, and replace every image with a QR‑code placeholder image using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-specific-images-on-pdf-page.title: Replace Specific Images on a PDF Page
replace-specific-images-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace selected images on a given PDF page using a dictionary that maps image indices to new image files.

replace-pdf-images-with-icc-profile.title: Replace PDF Images with ICC Profile Versions
replace-pdf-images-with-icc-profile.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and replace each embedded image with a JPEG that already contains an ICC color profile, then save the updated document.

replace-images-with-logo.title: Replace Images on PDF Pages with a Logo
replace-images-with-logo.description: Demonstrates how to locate all image placements on each PDF page using ImagePlacementAbsorber and replace them with a specified logo image.

replace-title-page-images-with-banner.title: Replace Title Page Images with High‑Resolution Banner
replace-title-page-images-with-banner.description: Shows how to replace all images on the first (title) page of a PDF with a high‑resolution banner while keeping the original layout using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-index-page-images-with-banner.title: Replace Images on First PDF Page with Banner
replace-index-page-images-with-banner.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access the images on the first page, and replace each of them with a single banner image to update branding.

replace-appendix-images-with-placeholder.title: Replace Appendix Images with Placeholder in PDF
replace-appendix-images-with-placeholder.description: Loads a PDF, detects pages that belong to the appendix by searching for the word "Appendix", and replaces every image on those pages with a single placeholder image.

remove-all-images-from-pdf.title: Remove All Images from a PDF
remove-all-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete every image from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by clearing the page's image collection and saving the result.

remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.title: Remove Low-Resolution Images from PDF
remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete images whose DPI is lower than 72 from a PDF using ImagePlacementAbsorber, hide them, and then optimize the document resources.

delete-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.title: Delete Low-Resolution Images from PDF
delete-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove images with a DPI lower than 72 from a PDF using ImagePlacementAbsorber, hide them, and then optimize the document resources.

remove-duplicate-images-pdf.title: Remove Duplicate Images Across PDF Pages
remove-duplicate-images-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, compare raw image bytes, and delete duplicate images using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-image-resolution-metadata.title: Extract Image Resolution Metadata from PDF Pages
extract-image-resolution-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, finds all image placements using ImagePlacementAbsorber, and reports their size and DPI resolution.

resize-images-half-size.title: Resize Images on PDF Pages to Half Size
resize-images-half-size.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and image objects, and reduce each image's width and height to 50% using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-images-using-configurable-sca.title: Resize Images in PDF Using Configurable Scale Factor
resize-pdf-images-using-configurable-sca.description: The example reads a scaling factor from a text configuration file, loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page and image, applies the factor via ImageScale, and saves the modified document.

resize-images-in-pdf-using-configurable-.title: Resize Images in PDF Using Configurable Scale Factor
resize-images-in-pdf-using-configurable-.description: Demonstrates loading a scaling factor from appsettings.json and applying it to all images in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-images-using-config.title: Resize PDF Images Using a Configuration File
resize-pdf-images-using-config.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON configuration that specifies target dimensions per page, extract each image from a PDF, resize it with System.Drawing, and replace the original image on the page.

add-raster-image-to-new-pdf-page.title: Add Raster Image to a New PDF Page
add-raster-image-to-new-pdf-page.description: Shows how to place a raster image (PNG, JPEG, etc.) on a newly added PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's Image class and the page's Paragraphs collection.

insert-raster-image-into-pdf.title: Insert Raster Image into PDF at Absolute Coordinates
insert-raster-image-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, define a rectangle with absolute coordinates, and add a raster image to a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-embedded-raster-image.title: Resize Embedded Raster Image in PDF
resize-embedded-raster-image.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate raster Image objects, set new width and height using FixWidth/FixHeight, and save the updated document.

replace-image-in-pdf-page.title: Replace Image in PDF Page
replace-image-in-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace an existing image on a PDF page with a new image loaded from a file stream using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-specific-raster-image-from-pdf-pa.title: Delete Specific Raster Image from PDF Page
delete-specific-raster-image-from-pdf-pa.description: Shows how to remove a raster image from a PDF page by deleting its reference using Aspose.Pdf's image collection API.

extract-raster-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Raster Images from PDF to PNG
extract-raster-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, extract raster image resources, and save them as separate PNG files.

extract-raster-images-from-pdf__v2.title: Extract Raster Images from PDF Preserving Original Format
extract-raster-images-from-pdf__v2.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page and its embedded images, saves each image to a memory stream, determines the original format from header bytes, and writes the raw bytes to disk, preserving the original image format.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files in a folder, load each with Aspose.Pdf, and extract all embedded images into separate output sub‑folders.

add-dicom-image-to-pdf-using-filestream.title: Add DICOM Image to PDF Using FileStream
add-dicom-image-to-pdf-using-filestream.description: Shows how to load a DICOM file via a FileStream, create an Aspose.Pdf.Image, and embed it on a PDF page, then save the document.

insert-dicom-image-with-custom-size.title: Insert DICOM Image with Custom Size into PDF
insert-dicom-image-with-custom-size.description: Demonstrates how to embed a DICOM image into a PDF and control its displayed size by setting Width and Height on an ImageStamp before adding it to a page.

render-pdf-page-to-png-with-fallback-fon.title: Render PDF Page to PNG with Fallback Font
render-pdf-page-to-png-with-fallback-fon.description: Shows how to render the first page of a PDF document to a PNG image while specifying a fallback font using Aspose.Pdf's RenderingOptions.

render-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-with-default-fo.title: Render PDF Pages to JPEG with Default Font Substitution
render-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-with-default-fo.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document to a JPEG image while specifying a default font for any missing glyphs during rendering.

generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages
generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.description: Creates 150x200 pixel PNG thumbnail images for each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ThumbnailDevice.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-with-default-fo.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images with Default Font Arial
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-with-default-fo.description: Demonstrates setting RenderingOptions.DefaultFontName to Arial and converting each page of a PDF document to PNG images using Aspose.Pdf.

render-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw-fallba.title: Render PDF to Multi-Page TIFF with LZW Compression and Font Fallback
render-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw-fallba.description: Loads a PDF, registers a fallback font for missing glyphs, and converts all pages into a single multi-page TIFF file using LZW compression.

export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-300-dpi.title: Export PDF Pages to BMP Images at 300 DPI
export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-300-dpi.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting a 300 DPI resolution, and rendering each page to a BMP file using BmpDevice and optional rendering options.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with Default Font
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates converting an entire PDF document to a multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf, configuring resolution, TIFF settings, and applying a default font for missing fonts.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber to collect vector graphics from a specific PDF page and convert them to an SVG file with SvgExtractor.

move-vector-graphic-on-pdf-page.title: Move Vector Graphic on PDF Page
move-vector-graphic-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates extracting a vector graphic from a PDF page with GraphicsAbsorber, changing its Position (which updates the internal matrix), and saving the modified document.

transfer-vector-graphic-to-another-pdf-p.title: Transfer Vector Graphic to Another PDF Page with Position Adjustment
transfer-vector-graphic-to-another-pdf-p.description: Demonstrates extracting vector graphics from one PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber, shifting their position, and placing them onto another page.

remove-vector-graphic-from-pdf-page.title: Remove a Vector Graphic from a PDF Page
remove-vector-graphic-from-pdf-page.description: Shows how to locate vector graphics on a PDF page with GraphicsAbsorber and delete a specific graphic using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-vector-graphics-between-pdf-pages.title: Copy Vector Graphics Between PDF Pages
copy-vector-graphics-between-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract vector graphics from a source PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and insert each graphic into a target PDF page.

add-vector-graphics-collection-to-pdf-pa.title: Add Vector Graphics Collection to PDF Page
add-vector-graphics-collection-to-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to create a collection of vector shapes (line, rectangle, ellipse) and add them to a new PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's Graph object.

batch-extract-vector-graphics-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
batch-extract-vector-graphics-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, detect pages with vector graphics, and extract each graphic as an individual SVG file into organized folders.

add-alternative-text-to-pdf-images.title: Add Alternative Text to PDF Images
add-alternative-text-to-pdf-images.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and image resources, and set alternative text for each image to improve accessibility, then save the updated document.

retrieve-alt-text-from-pdf-images.title: Retrieve Alternative Text from PDF Images
retrieve-alt-text-from-pdf-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and images, extract each image's alternative (alt) text, and log the results for auditing.

add-image-with-alt-text-to-pdf.title: Add Image with Alternative Text to PDF
add-image-with-alt-text-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert an image into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and assign alternative (alt) text for accessibility purposes.

render-pdf-pages-to-png-300-dpi.title: Render PDF Pages to PNG at 300 DPI
render-pdf-pages-to-png-300-dpi.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting a 300 DPI resolution, and rendering each page to a PNG image file.

convert-pdf-to-png-with-default-font.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Default Font Override
convert-pdf-to-png-with-default-font.description: Loads a PDF, sets RenderingOptions.DefaultFontName to "Times New Roman" to replace missing fonts, and converts each page to a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-vector-with-raster-image.title: Replace Vector Graphic with Raster Image in PDF
replace-vector-with-raster-image.description: Shows how to overlay a raster image onto a specific area where a vector graphic resides in a PDF, preserving the original layout using Aspose.Pdf.
